summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Angular School ERP application. Login functionality, navigation, and most modules are working correctly. Found session management issues and dashboard content loading problems.

ui_bugs.issue: Dashboard main content area appears empty despite KPI cards being present
Sessions expire quickly causing unexpected redirects to login page

integration_issues.issue: Unable to fully test Teacher and Parent dashboards due to session timeouts

design_issues.issue: Some navigation items have inconsistent data-testid values (e.g., 'Audit Log' vs 'audit-log')

passed_tests: Login page loads with all required fields (school code, email, password)
KPI cards are present (4 cards found)
Sidebar navigation works with role-based menu items
Students page loads with table, search, filters, and Add Student button
Navigation to Teachers, Academic, Attendance pages works
Navigation to Timetable, Exams, Fees, Communication pages works
Navigation to Reports, Transport, Library, Hostel, Payroll pages works
Documents page loads with mock data and proper table structure
All major routing functionality works correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix dashboard content loading issue where main content area appears empty. Investigate session management causing quick timeouts. Ensure consistent data-testid naming for navigation items.
